title: Set non-user-facing visibility on dispatch-only agents
description: Set `user-invocable: false` in the YAML frontmatter of all agents that are only dispatched by Ticketer or CTO and should never be invoked directly by users. Affected agents: Backend, Frontend, QA, Security, CIReviewer, Documentation, Validator, TODO. CTO, Ticketer, Research, ProductManager, Architect, UIDesigner, DevOps remain `user-invocable: true`.
acceptance_criteria: Given Backend.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given Frontend.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given QA.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given Security.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given CIReviewer.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given Documentation.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given Validator.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
Given TODO.agent.md, When frontmatter is read, Then user-invocable is false
CTO and Ticketer remain user-invocable true
